---
pagetitle: "Eigenholm"
listing:
  id: latest-posts
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  feed: true
  fields: [title, description, author, date, categories, reading-time]
page-layout: full
toc: false
title-block-banner: false
---

::: {.eigenholm-hero}
[Eigenholm]{.hero-title}

[Research notes, paper analyses, and technical experiments in machine learning, mathematics, and scientific computing.]{.hero-tagline}

::: {.eigenholm-topics}
[Machine Learning]{.topic-tag}
[Deep Learning]{.topic-tag}
[Mathematics]{.topic-tag}
[Scientific Computing]{.topic-tag}
[Paper Replications]{.topic-tag}
:::
:::

[Latest Writing]{.eigenholm-section-header}

::: {#latest-posts}
:::
